description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named EVE CI that runs on every pull request to the main branch. The workflow should have multiple jobs for different environments and configurations, including install, no_pch, random, macosx, msvc, partial-support, and various x86 targets. Each job should have a strategy for running on different configurations and should execute a series of steps to fetch the current branch, run cmake, compile unit tests, and run tests.
